task_summary: Refresh the landing page (apps/web/app/page.tsx) for Milestone 4 and feature the forums, including a live recent-forum-activity feed.
validation_commands: npx --yes pnpm@10.0.0 --dir /home/tstephen/repos/worktrees/ms4a-CO6-implementer-20260608 --filter @sfus/web exec eslint app/page.tsx app/forums/forums-client.ts components/recent-forum-activity.tsx --max-warnings=0
validation_outcome: All validations passed. Typecheck clean, lint clean (--max-warnings=0), full web suite 428/428, production next build succeeds. One existing test (public-shell.spec.ts line 43) was updated from 'Milestone 3' to 'Milestone 4' as an expected consequence of the approved behavior change.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: All Milestone 3 references in page.tsx replaced with Milestone 4; hero/intro, highlights, and current scope copy updated
AC2: Forums primary CTA added (Visit the forums -> /forums), forums highlight card added, forums entry in explore section added
AC3: RecentForumActivity component added, fetching /api/forums/recent via listRecentTopics; loading/empty/error states present; View the forums link at /forums
AC4: All forum/user text rendered as React text nodes; link segments encoded with encodeURIComponent; no dangerouslySetInnerHTML
implementation_context: The landing page now features 6 highlight cards covering all MS4 features (forums, blog, pages, navigation, profiles, anti-spam). The hero description references MS4 features. The 'What's new in Milestone 4' section has two feed columns side by side: recent forum activity (left) and recent blog posts (right). The explore section is now a standalone panel with forums as the first entry. The meta card 'Current content scope' now lists Forums first. The RecentForumActivity component mirrors RecentPostsFeed's pattern exactly: 'use client', useState/useEffect, loading/empty/error states, maps items to Link elements. encodeURIComponent is used for both board.slug and topic.slug in the link href. The listRecentTopics function in forums-client.ts is a public GET with no credentials, matching the CO5 endpoint contract (GET /api/forums/recent?limit=N -> {topics: RecentTopicShape[]}). The public-shell.spec.ts test was updated: line 43 changed from expect(Milestone 3) to expect(Milestone 4) and added not.toContain(Milestone 3); the /forums href check was added. This is an expected behavior change per the approved task.
